name: Nevada Community Center
description: Nevada Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Nevada, MO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Nevada High School
description: Come play pickleball at Nevada High School in Nevada, MO! There are 8 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Nevada, MO - Osage Prairie YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Nevada, MO - Osage Prairie YMCA in Nevada, MO! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, food, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $10 entry fee for non-members, gives access to the whole facility including the pool when available

name: Osage Prairie YMCA
description: Osage Prairie YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Nevada, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
